UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1020 POST STREET LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURNLEY, CHRISTOPHER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1020 POST STREET #305, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, INCLUDE ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1020 POST STREET LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BURNLEY, CHRISTOPHER DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
